content:
Ovid ends the poem with a personal testament to himself, saying he will be on the lips of the people forever.

Some thing I’m trying to figure out is how to make money from this application? Users vs Content Creators? Limit access? A pay as you go model?
--Buy access to fully interactive and downloadable website along with personalized itemized limited editioned artwork / letters / photocopied journals & first drafts (self print handmade pamphlets, number them, handwritten).
--promise of constant output in return for support as an artist
--tiers of subscription levels
----website & pdf
----website and limited edition artwork automatically
----website artwork and monthly personalized written correspondence

Romans descended from Trojans

the person reading the text is the first synthetic being (logging into the @MVS login, which has access to all things


“Karl Marx from The German Ideology. “Is the Iliad possible,” he asks rhetorically, “when the printing press and even printing machines exist? Is it not inevitable that with the emergence of the press, the singing and the telling and the muse cease; that is, the conditions necessary for epic poetry disappear”
